risks.title: Duplicate event emissions in code observer
risks.evidence: Four events for the same file (Security.tsx) with near-identical timestamps; explicit 'duplicate-event' and 'duplicate' tags in event metadata
risks.recommendedAction: Audit code-observer emission logic to prevent multi-emit on single file change; implement timestamp-based deduplication threshold

risks.title: Security file modified without documented verification
risks.evidence: Security.tsx (src/screens/) changed; events suggest changes but no verification status or test results attached
risks.recommendedAction: Run security-focused tests immediately; review changes in context of auth/permission/secrets handling

opportunities.title: Automate security file change validation
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx is a frontend security screen component; changes warrant automated compliance checks
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add pre-commit hook or CI step that auto-runs security audit when src/screens/Security.tsx is modified

opportunities.title: Implement event deduplication in monitoring
opportunities.evidence: Clear pattern of duplicate events with <2ms timestamp variance; suggests polling/batch emission bug
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add idempotency key or deduplication window to code-observer pipeline

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes and run security tests
taskCandidates.description: Inspect recent modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx for security implications; execute security test suite to validate no regressions
taskCandidates.rationale: Security-related file changes require immediate review; events explicitly recommend testing

taskCandidates.title: Debug and fix event deduplication in code observer
taskCandidates.description: Investigate why Security.tsx change triggered 4 events with near-identical timestamps; implement deduplication logic
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events pollute monitoring signal; systemic issue affecting data quality

recommendations.title: Prioritize security file review
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is a critical component; changes should be reviewed before merging to main
recommendations.action: Run: `npm run test:security` (or equivalent security test suite) and manually review diff for authentication/authorization changes

recommendations.title: Add file-specific event routing
recommendations.rationale: Security-sensitive files should trigger different event handling (deduplication, priority escalation)
recommendations.action: Update code-observer config to tag security-related paths for elevated verification; implement 100ms deduplication window

pendingApprovals.taskTitle: Review Security.tsx changes and run security tests
pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes and run security tests
